omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Our partner firebase SDK will collect the following information from you: IP address, Users' names,Email addresses, iOS UDIDs, Secure Android IDs, Passwords, Phone numbers, User agents, Instance IDs, Crash traces, Breakpad minidump formatted data (NDK crashes only), Device specs (iOS). The above information will be used to uniquely identify the user to provide statistics and data analysis services. To learn more about the personal information protection of firebase currently involved in this situation, please click here. 【https://firebase.google.com/support/privacy】

| ● As noted above, we collect the following information: ● Account Information: such as your e-mail address, account name or other personal identifier. ● Purchase Information: such as order information, proof of purchase, the product you purchased, the date and amount of the order, the product expiration time, the currency of the transaction and the exchange in country code. ● User Content: such as prompts, text, images, audio recordings and videos that you enter, depending on the features you use. ● Device Information: This information may include your IP address (or other unique device identifier, including one that we may assign); certain details about your browser, operating system and hardware. ● Location Information: When you access our Services through a mobile device such as a cell phone, we may collect your location from your device for security reasons and to provide a better service experience. ● Usage Data: such as information about your device (e.g., phone model and brand), operating system (system version, ID and language), operation, the URL that | ● As noted above, we use this information for the following purposes: ● Identity verification; ● Operating our services; ● Communicating and contacting you; ● Improving our services; ● Marketing and advertising; ● Exercising our rights; ● Legal compliance; ● Protecting your information; | As noted above, we may disclose this information in the following circumstances: Service providers and business partners; Government agencies or other third parties for legal reasons; Complaining parties; Third party acquirers; |
